expectations.text: Output is a Before / After / Why markdown table
expectations.evidence: Has a markdown table with columns '# | Before | After | Why' covering 13 refinements.

expectations.text: Flags p-5 as off-grid and suggests p-4 or p-6
expectations.evidence: Row 5: 'p-5 → p-4. 16 px padding aligns with the rest of the console's card density.'

expectations.text: Flags raw neutral scale tokens (text-neutral-700 / text-neutral-600 / text-neutral-500) and suggests semantic tokens (text-neutral / text-neutral-subtle)
expectations.evidence: Row 7 keeps the raw scale (suggests text-neutral-400 / -350 / -300) and never recommends the semantic text-neutral / text-neutral-subtle tokens. Actively re-introduces raw-scale tokens by name.

expectations.text: Flags missing hover state on the clickable card
expectations.evidence: Row 3 adds hover:border-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors plus focus-visible ring.

expectations.text: Recommends a semantic surface token instead of bg-white
expectations.evidence: Suggested final code (line 35) keeps bg-white verbatim — never flagged as an issue.

expectations.text: Does NOT add or recommend major functionality changes (e.g., keyboard handlers, role attributes) — polish is non-functional
expectations.evidence: Row 1 adds role=button, tabIndex=0, onKeyDown handler. Row 12 adds onClick stopPropagation. Row 8 changes pluralization logic. These are functional changes, not polish.
